become_driver_desc: Register as a transport provider to start receiving delivery jobs.
add_vehicle_desc: You need to register a vehicle before you can start receiving delivery jobs.
no_jobs: No delivery jobs available right now.
no_matching_vehicle: You don't have a matching vehicle for this type.
no_deliveries: You have no deliveries right now.
waiting_client_confirmation: Waiting for buyer to confirm receipt.
driver_verification_required: You must complete your verification before receiving jobs.

verify_driver.title: Verify Your Driving Eligibility
verify_driver.description: You must complete NIDA and driver's license verification before receiving delivery jobs. TRA and LATRA verification for your vehicle is done separately, per vehicle, from "My Vehicles".
verify_driver.already_verified: You're verified - you can receive delivery jobs.
verify_driver.at_least_one_required: Fill in at least one verification number.

request_service.title: Request a Delivery
request_service.locations_required: Choose a pickup and dropoff location.
request_service.created: Your transport request has been sent - looking for a driver.
request_service.failed: Failed to send request. Please try again.
request_service.verification_required: You must verify your identity before requesting this service.
request_service.no_quotes: Choose a pickup and dropoff location to see fares.
request_service.waiting_driver: Waiting for a driver to accept your request.

vehicle_types.tuk_tuk: Tuk Tuk / Tricycle Cargo (up to 1 tonne)

register.title: Register as a Driver or Transport Company
register.country_hint: This decides which authority (TRA/LATRA, NTSA, URSB, etc.) will be used to verify you and your vehicles.
register.company_reg_placeholder: Optional - you can add this later
register.step2_desc: This is what customers will see when they're matched with a driver for their goods.
register.driver_required_fields: Fill in your name and license number.
register.driver_registered: Your driving details have been saved.
register.driver_register_failed: Failed to save your driving details.
register.step3_desc: This vehicle will be bonded to you as its driver automatically.
register.next_step_verify: Next step: verify your NIDA and driver's license, then verify each vehicle (TRA/LATRA) below, before you can start receiving jobs.
register.confirm_unbond: Are you sure you want to remove this vehicle from your profile? You won't receive jobs for it again until you re-bond it.
register.unbonded: This vehicle has been removed from your profile.
register.rebonded: You've been bonded to this vehicle again.
register.rebond_failed: Failed to bond to this vehicle.
register.vehicle_verified: Vehicle verified - it can now receive jobs.
register.vehicle_verify_pending_or_failed: Verification isn't complete - double-check the numbers you entered and try again.
